headline: How The Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Integration Risks
summary: Huntington Bancshares is seeing a modest reset in expectations, with a fair value price target now set at US$20.13, slightly below the prior US$20.60 mark. That tweak lines up with recent analyst commentary that mixes optimism on capital strength and credit trends with caution around integration risk and broader macro concerns, which is keeping most targets clustered in the high teens to low US$20s. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can keep track of the key...
